Content Health Details
Page: DEP - DomoStats DataSets and DataFlows App
Description:
CONTENT HEALTH DETAILS

Displays DataSets below 100% health. Investigate and consider deleting DataSets with low health scores. 

WARNING!!! 
>>> SOME DATASETS THAT SHOW ZERO CARDS POWERED ARE STILL FEEDING INTO DATAFLOWS WITH CARDS BUILT ON THEM. BE CAREFUL NOT TO DELETE THESE SUPPORTING DATASETS!

POINT SYSTEM:
Each DataSet begins with a score of 100%. For each point in each health category, the DataSet's health score is reduced by 10%.

- Cards Powered Check: 0 cards powered by DataSet = 2pts, 1 card powered by DataSet = 1pt, 2+ cards powered by DataSet = 0pts

- DataSet Owned Check: No owner = 1, Owned = 0

- DataSet Name Check: DataSet name contains any of these words (test, delete, sample, deprecate, old, asdf) = 1, Doesn't contain any trigger words = 0

- Duplicate Name Check: DataSet has a non-unique name = 1, Unique name = 0

- Last Run Check: Looks at the Schedule Type and determines if the DataSet or DataFlow should have run but hasn't. For example, if there is a DataSet with a Schedule Type = 'Day' and it was last run less than 24 hours ago then its assigned points = 0, Last run 24- 26 hours ago = 1, Last run more than 26 hours ago = 2

- Manual Schedule Check: DataSet Schedule set to "Manual" = 1, Schedule not set to "Manual" = 0

- Status Check: DataSet Status is "ERROR" = 1pt, Status is not "ERROR" = 0
Dataset Name: DomoStats - DataFlows DataSets People and Health

Content Health Details
Description:
CONTENT HEALTH DETAILS

Displays DataSets below 100% health. Investigate and consider deleting DataSets with low health scores. 

WARNING!!! 
>>> SOME DATASETS THAT SHOW ZERO CARDS POWERED ARE STILL FEEDING INTO DATAFLOWS WITH CARDS BUILT ON THEM. BE CAREFUL NOT TO DELETE THESE SUPPORTING DATASETS!

POINT SYSTEM:
Each DataSet begins with a score of 100%. For each point in each health category, the DataSet's health score is reduced by 10%.

- Cards Powered Check: 0 cards powered by DataSet = 2pts, 1 card powered by DataSet = 1pt, 2+ cards powered by DataSet = 0pts

- DataSet Owned Check: No owner = 1, Owned = 0

- DataSet Name Check: DataSet name contains any of these words (test, delete, sample, deprecate, old, asdf) = 1, Doesn't contain any trigger words = 0

- Duplicate Name Check: DataSet has a non-unique name = 1, Unique name = 0

- Last Run Check: Looks at the Schedule Type and determines if the DataSet or DataFlow should have run but hasn't. For example, if there is a DataSet with a Schedule Type = 'Day' and it was last run less than 24 hours ago then its assigned points = 0, Last run 24- 26 hours ago = 1, Last run more than 26 hours ago = 2

- Manual Schedule Check: DataSet Schedule set to "Manual" = 1, Schedule not set to "Manual" = 0

- Status Check: DataSet Status is "ERROR" = 1pt, Status is not "ERROR" = 0
Dataset Name: DomoStats - DataFlows DataSets People and Health
